palette: Polished chrome, sapphire blue, and dusty marigold (sunset over Whitefield).
lighting: Golden hour reflection off glass skyscrapers, high-contrast shadows, cool interior office glow.
instagram_prompts: First-person perspective (FPP) from a low-flying drone over a dense intersection in Whitefield, Bengaluru. Chrome-and-glass skyscrapers rise on either side, reflecting a brilliant marigold sunset. In the foreground, the concrete pillars of a new metro line are draped in green safety netting. No people visible, world feels massive. Sharp, architectural photography style.

FPP view from a high-floor window in 'The Den' hotel. A clean, white minimalist desk in the foreground with a glowing blue fiber-optic cable coiled neatly. Beyond the glass, a sprawling grid of tech parks at dusk, thousands of tiny office lights flickering like a circuit board. Cool interior lighting vs warm sunset exterior.

Macro FPP shot of a rugged, weathered stone carving on the base of a modern steel sculpture in a Bengaluru tech park. The texture of ancient granite against the smooth, brushed metal of a server cooling vent. Dusty marigold light catching the edges of the stone. World is enormous, microscale perspective.
